What we're gonna be covering today is probably the, I would say the most important part of this entire process because it's what gets people to give you money. And it's funny when I, my screen just went black for a second. Are you guys all still there? I apologize. Okay, cool. You guys can hear me so we'll just keep going. So when I first got in this business, one of the big things that I started learning about was writing sales copy. And it was something that I did not like at all. I hated writing and for a long time I didn't wanna do it and then I eventually started hiring copywriters but copywriting got really expensive. In fact, one of you guys asked me today about hiring a copywriter. And a good copywriter is gonna cost you $15,000 plus usually 10% of your sales. So it's very, very expensive. And so for a long time that's just what we did and we just ate it and it cost us millions of dollars in copywriting fees to make our, to grow our business. And over the last year, so we've really been trying to figure out different ways that we can sell stuff without having to have copywriters because it's so difficult. And so what's nice about this black box process that we're showing you guys is you can literally sell every single product in this funnel without actually having a real sales letter. There are basically two very simple scripts that you need to follow. And I'm gonna show you both two today. And it's almost so simple that you'll be like, there's no way that works Russell. But after you do it, you'll see that it actually out converts even like paying someone a ton of money for a really expensive sales letter. So that's just kind of, this is my gift to you guys. This is 12 years now of me spending insane amounts of money on copywriters to find out a very simple, very easy formula that works. And 50% of that is having the right funnel like we've been talking about over the last few weeks. And the other 50% is just having the script right. The first step right here is your landing page, where we're giving away your free CD, your free DVD, your free book, whatever it is that you're selling, right? And there's gonna be a video right here on this page. The next page is your free case study page. There's gonna be a video up here sharing a case study. And down here's your order form. The next thing is your actual invisible funnel where you're doing your teaching and your training and your coaching. And then the last page is an application page. We've actually found that on the application page, just having a short, like a paragraph worth of text, asking them if they want, if you want more help with this, is pretty much all that you really need on this page. Having a video, actually, most cases actually hurts applications. So basically, your invisible funnel training is where, is your sales, in theory, it's your sales video or whatever for your application form. The application form should just pretty much be your application form with maybe a headline and that's about it. Okay, so the first one we're gonna talk about is this free CD page or the free DVD page or whatever you wanna call it. Now, if you come right here, this is an example, obviously, of the most recent one that we rolled out, which is the .com secrets labs. And it's funny, so we rolled this out and for about a week and a half, I had a really nice long sales video on this in the spot right here. Some of you guys may have seen it. And actually, if you watch the video right now, after like the first two minutes, then it cuts back, that video has the whole video. But what's interesting is just having this little video of me right here out converted this nice professional sales written thing that I spent a ton of time writing. And the other interesting thing is this video that we created has become the number one traffic generator on Facebook, okay? And we'll talk about that when we get to the Facebook modules. But what we found on a free plus shipping offer, when you're selling it, you don't need to sell it. The only thing you have to sell is your excitement and they wanna see it. So my basic script here was, hey, we just got in a box of these books, they're awesome and I wanna ship one out to you, okay? And the excitement and the energy and my emotion is what's sold it, getting people fired up on that topic, okay? Now, there is a script that I followed when I did this video and I do any kind of video like this. And it's a very simple script and I want you guys all to memorize this because you're gonna be doing it probably more than once. This is the script, okay? First step is who are you? Second script is what do you have? Third is why do they need it? And number four is how can they get it, okay? Now, I learned this initially from one of my friends who's a famous copywriter, his name's John Carlton. And John told me basically, he said that, he's like, in any sales that I write, he's like, there's only four questions I have to answer. So I can answer those four questions, he's like, it's gonna work. And I said, what are those questions? And he said, number one, who are you? Number two, what do you have? Number three, why do they need it? And number four is how can they get it? So if you can answer those four questions, you will sell anything you have. And so whenever I make a video, especially for like a free plus shipping type thing, my goal is to show it and just be like, boom, here it is. And then say, hey, my name is Russell Brunson. And so that's who I am. Number two, I've got a free book that's gonna show you 108 of my proven split test winners. We've been testing stuff over the last 10 years and we found out what works and what doesn't work. Okay, so I covered who am I? I'm Russell Brunson, what do I have? I got this book that's gonna show you all my best split tests. Next thing is why do you need it? If you've got a website and you're running a business online, all you gotta do is take any of these 108 split tests, take even one of them, apply it to your website and I guarantee you, you'll see an immediate increase in your sales and your conversions and you'll make more money. And that's if you just apply one. Imagine if you apply to all 108 of them. Okay, that's why they need it. And how do you get it? All you gotta just click on the slide over here, let me know your shipping details and I'll ship one out to you right away. Boom, there's the script. Okay, you guys see how powerful that is? It's almost too simple. Show me guys you're gonna overcomplicate bank. No, Russell, I need to write a big sales video for it and you're gonna try to overcomplicate it. But it literally can just be that. Okay, who are you? What do you have? Why do they need it and how can they get it? Okay, that's it. And I didn't want a blank wall, I wanted more texture. So I wanted a door, blinds. I just want something so it's not boring. Against a white wall, it's more boring. Now, I'd rather be on a couch. Sometimes I've grabbed plants in my office and I have a plant sit up behind me just with this texture in the background. But I don't think it matters what it is. Like you look at other people in your market are selling things, most of them are coming to a slick sales video or they're coming to, you know, whatever it is, and this is a pattern interrupt. Same thing with free plus shipping is like a pattern interrupt. It's something different that they're not used to seeing and that's why people respond to it so well because it's different. Like what is this? Whereas you come to somebody, everybody else aside they see the same thing over and over again. It becomes the pattern and they just, they get kind of like, we call it banner blind lists with banner ads. Like people stop seeing the banner ads because they've seen so many. Same thing with, if you have to look and feel the same every single time, then people just stop noticing it. So having something like this is just different and like what's happening? But basically Billy Mays was like, if you guys remember, he was like, he was the pitch man, right? He's oxy clean and about a thousand other prog, the best pitch man in the history of the world. And so when he passed away, Rich wrote a whole thing about how he sold, why it worked. And a lot of it, again, you guys, this is your homework. I'm gonna add this to your homework. You should all go here and read this. Let me post the link to everybody too. So go and read the article tonight, but it'll walk you through how he did his thing. And one of the biggest things about how he pitched was, it was always product demonstration. Like here's a product demonstration. So he shows oxy clean, how he cleans the thing so fast and he shows whatever. And in our world with info products and stuff, you usually don't get that demonstration thing. Yet demonstration is probably the most powerful way to actually sell something. And so that's why I think this works so good because it's a product demo. The reason why this works so good is because boom, it's a product demo, right? And so you're kind of demoing, and it's just a CD or DVD or a book or whatever it is you're selling, but by showing that thing, it just, it makes it more tangible. So I'm gonna talk about the script right here for the invisible funnel. All right. All right, so here's the invisible funnel script. Okay, so again, you guys write this down. I'll send you a handout as well with everything written now, but the first step is to thank them for ordering. Okay, the worst thing you can do is have somebody buy something, the next page just starts selling something immediately and they're confused. They're like, wait, did my order go through? What's happening? So the first thing is just like, hey, thank you so much for ordering. Again, your CD, your DVDs, we're putting in the mail. It's gonna be there any within a week. Just wanna thank you for your order. Then transitions into, hey, I wanna share with you a case study about somebody else who went through the same process that you're about to learn about. Okay, so if they just bought, excuse me, if they just bought a free CD on weight loss, excuse me, then I'm gonna share at least one and up to three case studies about other people who have taken through the weight loss program and have lost weight, okay? If it's 4x, I'm gonna show you between one and three other people that have gone through my system and had success with it. Okay, so I'm gonna say, hey, before we go, before you move on, I wanna share with you a couple case studies of people just like you who bought the same thing you just bought and had a lot of success with it. And so what I'm gonna do is I'm gonna show you three really cool and really powerful success stories. The first one is Mike. Now one thing I wanna stress to you guys about these case studies, the place that most people make mistakes on this video is they try to teach on this video. Okay, your goal on this video is not to teach. Your goal is just to share results, okay? If you start teaching like, this is what he did, they did this, they did this, and then it gives people too much information and that's not the goal when you're trying to sell them. You're trying to make them excited about the potential and the possibilities about what they're gonna be learning about, but you don't teach them at this point. Okay, so you're sharing the results of different case studies. Okay, so Suzy tried my program and she lost 13 pounds in the first six days. Mike tried it and he was able to drop his clothes by five pants sizes and then so and so did it. Here's a before picture and the after picture. Okay, here's so and so, they took my forex course. They'd never traded online ever. Within six months they were making, boom, here's the email he sent me last week, check it out, boom, boom, boom, boom, boom, boom, right? So you share in the case study. Again, now those who went through, those who went through the 108 split tests and you read about my trial closes, every time you share a case study, it's the best time to drop a trial close. Okay, so again, a trial close is basically a statement where I'm trying to get them to agree and say yes, and so I might share a case study about how Julie lost 30 pounds in 30 days and then I stop and I insert my trial close and say, isn't that awesome? Can you imagine what would happen? Can you imagine what your family would say if you were to lose 30 pounds in the next 30 days? Okay, so I'm just asking them questions. Can you imagine, isn't that cool? Can you imagine, or what would your family say? Things like that, I usually ask after I share a case study and then I move on to the next one. And here's Mike and this is what he did, isn't that awesome? Can you guys see yourselves doing this? Isn't that cool? So those are the little trial closes that I will drop. Okay, but you're sharing case studies. Okay, so you're not selling anything, you're just showing the results of what your system is. Okay, then the third step is you now to your premium training. Okay, so I said, hey, here's what Mike did, Suzy did, Joe did this, and I know that when you get the seed in the mail, you're gonna love it, but I wanna talk to you really quick about a premium training I'm gonna be doing. Okay, so I'm announcing my premium training. This is where you're transitioning now to the sell. Okay, I'm doing this premium training, you're gonna love it. And it is a premium training, so you gotta basically say it's a premium training, people will pay, and I usually tell them the price. It's a premium training, people pay $97 to be on this training, but what's cool is because you just purchased my free CD, I'm gonna do something very special we don't do for anyone else, I'm gonna let you try this for free. Okay, so now it's your premium training and the price, in fact, I'm gonna put in here price because, this key. Okay, so now it's your premium training and your price, it's normally 97 bucks, but I'm gonna let you try it for free because, and then you share why, and because it's because they just, they took you up on your first offer. You had enough faith in me to try out my free CD, now I'm gonna let you try this for free as well. Okay, so you see how easy this transitions you guys? It's free plus shipping into an invisible funnel, it's like the greatest little sales path in the world, it's beautiful. Okay, and then you explain the details of how it works. So this is how it works. First off, you're gonna put $0 down right now, you're gonna put your credit card in, but I'm not gonna bill you anything, and then after the webinar is over, you're gonna have a chance to decide if it was worth it or not. Now if it was worth it, you're just gonna pay, whatever it is, 47 bucks, 97 bucks, 300 bucks, whatever it is, you're only gonna pay $97 after the training is over, but only if you love it, okay? And I love dropping this in here because this makes it real to them. I would say it's kind of like going to a movie, but you only pay if you love the movie. Can you imagine that? So let's say you went and you saw Muppets Christmas, I don't know, you saw Muppets Christmas, you hated it, you could walk out and not even pay anything. Same thing here, you go and sing and you don't love it and you don't learn the tongue from it, just let me know, I won't charge you a penny, but if you love it, then don't do anything and it will bill you. So this is what you're gonna do. You're gonna put your credit card in right now, but again, I'm not gonna bill you, and then the end of the event, I'm gonna ask you this question. So the end of this invisible funnel, at the end of this training, I'm gonna ask you this question. I'm gonna say, if this event was not worth your time, just email me at a secret email address I'm gonna reveal on the webinar and you want to pay a dime. Does that sound fair, you guys? Does it sound more than fair? Awesome, okay, there was two trial closes I dropped. But that's it, then all you gotta do then is put in your credit card right now and we'll see you on the webinar. Okay, that's literally a script, you guys. Very simple and very easy and this will out convert any $10,000 sales video you will ever find. Okay, because the process, again, you're thanking them, which is very congruent with what they just came from, step number one, you're sharing case studies, which gives them excited about what's about to happen, but it also postures you and positions you for the next sale, then you announce your premium training and the price, and they're like, wow, that's really cool, but I can't pay 97 bucks. Some people are doing, in fact, we have a lot of people who don't do the $0, they do like a $1. In fact, if you look at the first one I ever did, I feel like Bootcamp.com, I did a $1, because I was using ClickBank, and ClickBank wouldn't allow you to do $0, so we did a dollar upfront, it was a dollar upfront, and then we build a $97, I think this one was $47 later. So that way, I've seen other people who do $5 upfront, and then $97 later, so you can do different variations. If your credit card or merchant account won't allow you to do the $0, you can do the same pitch with like, hey, just put it on $5 right now, and then let me know afterwards, if you like it, we'll build you the rest. And another thing about case studies, a lot of times your case studies don't have to be yours. Now, like for example, let's say you're network marketing and you're in whatever company, XYZ, and you don't have any success yet, but other people in your company have, a lot of times you can ask them and have permission to share their story. So, hey, so-and-so is in this company, he made X amount of dollars. So-and-so is in this company, they lost all this weight. So you don't have to be like necessarily your students. If you're selling, you know, if you're selling a company on the back, something like that, you can find people who are using the same product or same system and use their stories.
